parsed.production_notes: A real human hand is composited over a digital app interface. The background illustrations within the app appear to be digital artwork, potentially AI-generated given the stylized rendering.

characters.appearance: A light-skinned human hand and lower forearm. The hand has short, unpainted fingernails and slender fingers. No distinguishing marks are visible.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the forearm.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise in its tapping actions.

scenes.setting: Digital app interface with a dark, stylized illustration of farm animals.

panels.panel_visual_description: A light-skinned human hand with short fingernails reaches into the frame from the bottom, with the index finger extended as if pointing or touching a surface. The background consists of a dark, stylized illustration of various farm animals, including a pig, horses, sheep, and chickens, standing in front of a dark, geometric barn structure. The lighting on the hand is even and bright, contrasting with the dark illustration behind it.

scenes.visual_description: A mobile app interface displays an illustration of farm animals above a block of English text. A human hand enters from the bottom and taps the word 'equal'. A pop-up shows the word's pronunciation and Chinese translation. The hand then taps 'important', triggering a similar pop-up.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Unknown speaker says: All animals are equal,
Unknown speaker says: equal
Unknown speaker says: but some animals are more important
Unknown speaker says: important
Unknown speaker says: than others," one of them
scenes.on_screen_text:
每天花10分钟读英文书 (Spend 10 minutes a day reading English books)
"All animals are equal, but some animals are more important than others," one of them read slowly.
The animals stood silent in the cold night, staring at the wall. They tried to remember the old words, but something felt wrong. No one spoke. The farm looked the same as always, yet nothing was the same anymore.
equal
[ˈiːkwəl]
平等的 (equal)
已掌握 (Mastered)
学习 (Learn)
important
[ɪmˈpɔːrtnt]
重要的 (important)

scenes.setting: Digital app interface with a warm, golden-hour illustration of farm animals.

panels.panel_visual_description: A light-skinned human hand with short fingernails is visible in the lower half of the frame, with the index finger extended. The background features a warm, golden-hour illustration of farm animals, including cows, sheep, and horses, gathered in a field with a red barn visible in the distance. The hand moves slightly, maintaining its pointing gesture against the illustrated background.

scenes.visual_description: The app interface updates with a new illustration of farm animals in a warm setting. The English text remains. The human hand continues to tap various words in the text, including 'slowly', 'cold', 'tried', 'words', 'something', 'farm', and 'always'. Each tap opens a dictionary pop-up with phonetic spelling and Chinese translation. The hand occasionally taps the 'Mastered' button.
